title: Hulk vs spiderman
prompt:
A hyper-realistic, cinematic wide-angle photograph of the Incredible Hulk and Spider-Man fighting on a devastated New York City street during the golden hour. Hulk, towering and green with intense muscle definition and ripped purple pants, is roaring, swinging a large, broken concrete slab. Spider-Man, in his classic textured red-and-blue suit, is mid-air, dodging dynamically, firing a web line at Hulk's chest.

Setting: Urban City. Tone: Epic & Dramatic.

panels.scene_description: ELS: Devastated New York City street during golden hour, skyscrapers in background
panels.caption: In a world torn apart by chaos and destruction...

panels.scene_description: WS: Hulk standing tall, roaring, with broken concrete slab in hand
WS: Spider-Man swinging into frame, web line trailing behind
panels.caption: Two titans clash in this ravaged city

panels.scene_description: WS: Hulk and Spider-Man facing off, cityscape in ruins behind
panels.caption: The battle for supremacy begins

panels.scene_description: MS: Hulk charging at Spider-Man, concrete slab at the ready
MCU: Spider-Man dodging Hulk's attack, webs firing from wrists
panels.dialogue: You're not taking over this city, Hulk!

bubbles.text: You're not taking over this city, Hulk!

panels.scene_description: WS: Hulk smashing through city streets, destruction in his wake
panels.caption: The beast unleashes his fury upon the city

panels.scene_description: LA: Spider-Man leaping over Hulk's attack, web line firing at Hulk's chest
MCU: Hulk stumbling back, web line stuck to his chest
DT: Spider-Man and Hulk clashing, speed lines radiating from the impact
HA: Spider-Man flying backward, Hulk's massive fist connecting
CU: Spider-Man's face, shocked and struggling
CU: Hulk's face, enraged and merciless
ECU: Spider-Man's eyes, a glimmer of hope
LA: Spider-Man unleashing a barrage of web lines, entangling Hulk
panels.caption: The tide of battle turns

panels.scene_description: WS: Hulk stumbling, covered in web lines, Spider-Man standing victorious
panels.caption: In the end, it is not the strongest who wins, but the smartest
